steps.explanation: The width is $w$ feet. The length is 6 feet longer than the width, so length $= w + 6$.

Evaluate each choice:
  • $2w + 6$: Only one length and one width added, missing a factor of 2. Eliminated.
  • $4w + 12$: Equals $2w + 2(w+6)$, the correct perimeter formula. That matches choice B — B is correct.
  • $w^2 + 6$: Uses multiplication instead of addition for dimensions. Eliminated.
  • $w^2 + 6w$: Produces area-like terms, not perimeter. Eliminated.
